399.reason: [fgetc() returns int, not char. Storing the result in a char makes the EOF check (ch != EOF) unreliable because EOF is -1, and on platforms where char is unsigned, -1 wraps to 255 (0xFF), which can never equal EOF, causing an infinite loop or failure to detect end-of-file. ch must be declared as int.]
